app.subtitle: World Cup 2026 collection
language.label: Language
guide.dashboardBody: The dashboard shows album progress, owned stickers, missing stickers and duplicates.
guide.collectionBody: Use search, filters and + / - buttons to update sticker quantity. Quantity above 1 means duplicate.
guide.quickReviewBody: Review one sticker at a time. Pick Missing or Owned and StickerMate moves to the next sticker.
guide.teamsBody: Open a team or album section to see owned, missing and duplicate stickers for that group.
guide.duplicatesBody: This page shows stickers you own more than once, which makes trade prep faster.
guide.tradesBody: Use trade QR tools to share only your missing stickers and duplicates, then find possible swaps.
guide.spendingBody: Manually track what you spent on packs, the album or individual stickers. Trades are not counted automatically.
guide.scanBody: Take or upload a photo, check detected codes, then save only after you confirm them.
guide.tradeQrBody: Your QR shares only your missing stickers and duplicates. It does not include private settings or history.
guide.friendQrBody: Paste or scan a friend's QR to import their trade list and see possible swaps.
guide.settingsBody: Change language, rerun onboarding, show help again, export data or reset collection.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
recent.title: Recently added
teams.label: Teams
search.label: Search stickers
filters.label: Sticker filters
view.label: View mode
empty.noStickersBody: Try another search or switch filters.
empty.noDuplicatesBody: Add a second copy of any sticker and it will show here.
onboarding.title: StickerMate
onboarding.body: Track your FIFA World Cup 2026 collection. Keep owned stickers, missing stickers and duplicates tidy in seconds.
onboarding.quickReviewBody: The easiest start if you are going through the album for the first time.
onboarding.bulkImportBody: Fastest if you already have a list of sticker codes.
onboarding.manualSetupBody: Browse the app first and mark stickers manually later.
onboarding.reviewChoiceBody: You already have saved album review progress. Choose whether to continue where you stopped or restart from the first sticker.
onboarding.reviewRestartBody: Start the album review again from sticker 1.
onboarding.skipBody: Go straight to the app and set everything later.
onboarding.importBody: Paste sticker codes separated by spaces, commas, tabs, or new lines.
duplicates.title: Duplicates
trades.title: Trades
trades.body: Trading lists and sharing can plug into this page later.
trades.emptyBody: The page is prepared for future wishlists, friend comparisons, and shareable duplicate lists.
more.title: More
more.body: Useful tools for scanning, trading, backups and app settings.
spending.title: Spending
spending.body: Track only the money you personally enter for album purchases.
spending.tradeNote: Trades are not counted as spending unless you manually add them as a spending entry.
spending.deleteConfirmBody: This removes only this spending entry. Your collection and trades stay unchanged.
scan.title: Scanning
scan.subtitle: Take a photo of stickers or an album page, then confirm codes before saving.
scan.ocrReady: AI/OCR recognition is prepared. Review and confirm codes manually before saving.
scan.ocrUnavailable: OCR is unavailable in this browser. You can still enter codes manually.
scan.manualReviewRecommended: No clear sticker codes were detected. Please check manually.
scan.noValidCodes: Add at least one valid album sticker code before saving.
scan.entrySpendingBody: Optional. Leave amount empty if this entry should not add spending.
tradeQr.title: My Trade QR
tradeQr.name: Your name
tradeQr.privacy: QR only shares your duplicates and missing stickers.
friendQr.title: Scan Friend QR
friendQr.subtitle: Paste QR JSON or upload a QR image to import a friend's trade profile.
friendQr.invalid: That is not a valid StickerMate trade QR.
friendQr.existing: A friend with this name already exists.
settings.title: Settings
settings.body: Autosave is always on. Your collection stays on this device.
settings.defaultCurrencyBody: Used for spending totals and as the default when adding a new purchase. No currency conversion is applied.
settings.dangerBody: Reset collection permanently removes saved sticker quantities on this device. Use onboarding again if you only want to revisit the setup guide.
settings.importReadError: That file could not be read as JSON.
settings.importInvalidError: That file is not a StickerMate export.
settings.importMissingQuantitiesError: The export is missing sticker quantities.
settings.onboardingConfirmBody: This will take you back to the initial setup guide. Your collection and entered stickers will not be deleted.
settings.resetConfirmBody: This permanently removes your saved sticker quantities from this device. This action cannot be undone.
settings.albumScopeNote: StickerMate tracks the 980 stickers needed to complete the standard album. Extra collector variants are excluded from the main album tracker.
help.title: Help
help.body: A short guide to StickerMate basics.
help.startBody: Start with Quick Album Review if you are new, or use Bulk import if you already have a list of codes.
help.entryBody: Use Scan, Quick Import, or the + buttons. You can enter multiple codes separated by spaces, commas or new lines.
help.statusTitle: What do Missing / Owned / Duplicate mean?
help.statusBody: Missing means quantity 0, Owned means quantity 1, and Duplicate means quantity above 1.
help.reviewTitle: How does Quick Album Review work?
help.reviewBody: Go through the album one sticker at a time. Choose Missing on the left or Owned on the right.
help.collectionBody: Collection shows all album stickers. Use search, filters and + / - buttons to quickly update quantity.
help.teamsBody: See progress by team and album section. Open a team to see owned, missing and duplicate stickers.
help.duplicatesBody: All stickers you own more than once appear there. This list is useful for trading.
help.spendingBody: In Spending, manually track how much money you spent on the album, packs or individual stickers. Trades are not counted automatically.
help.tradesBody: See what you can give and what your friend can give you. You can copy a WhatsApp trade message.
help.qrBody: The QR code only shares your missing stickers and duplicates. Scanning a friend's QR finds possible trades.
help.backupTitle: How do I save my data?
help.backupBody: Your data is stored on this device. Export a backup before changing phone or browser.
help.phoneBody: Export your collection on the old phone, then import that JSON file on the new phone.
review.title: Quick Album Review
review.completedBody: You now have a clean starting pass through the standard album.
